title: Create KeyStroke Automator app for Epic EHR keyboard automation
description: Build a keyboard automation app that sends configurable key sequences (Alt+S, Alt+O, Esc) with adjustable timing and repeat cycles. Target: Epic EHR via Citrix. Features: custom key sequences, timing control, cycle count.

title: Cadence - EHR Keyboard Macro Automation Tool
description: Desktop app for running keyboard sequences on Epic EHR via Citrix. Features: configurable key sequences, adjustable timing, repeat cycles, GUI + CLI + system tray, safety features (emergency stop, countdown, logging). Tech: Tauri v2, Rust + enigo, React + Shadcn/ui v4.
